methodology.ability_enhancement: A/B test: same prompt executed with_skill vs without_skill, scored against evals.json criteria
methodology.workflow_meta: with_skill only: execute skill workflow and score process completeness
methodology.note: IMPORTANT: Project rules (aos-frontend.md, aos-backend.md) are always loaded via CLAUDE.md, causing significant overlap with skill content. Baseline scores may be inflated.

baseline.observations: Project rules (aos-frontend.md) already enforce memo/displayName, dark mode, accessibility. Relative import used instead of @/ alias.

enhanced.observations: Path alias @/lib/utils used (vs baseline relative import). All patterns identical to baseline due to project rule overlap.

react-web-development.uplift_analysis: Near-zero uplift. Project rules (aos-frontend.md) already enforce all skill patterns. Only difference: @/ path alias. Skill serves as documentation/reference rather than adding new rules.

false_positive_avoidance.detail: Found additional issues outside 5-item scope (useful but not checklist-compliant)

report_completeness.detail: Table format but not 5-item checklist structure

baseline.observations: Detected all violations but used severity-based (10 items) rather than structured 5-item checklist. Found extra issues (console.log, null safety).

false_positive_avoidance.detail: No false positives, stayed within 5-item scope

actionable_feedback.detail: Specific fix per violation with code example

report_completeness.detail: Exact | # | 검사 항목 | 상태 | 이슈 수 | table format

enhanced.observations: Perfect 5-item checklist execution. Exact output format match. Code fix example included.

verify-frontend.uplift_analysis: Skill adds structured checklist format, exception awareness, and AOS-specific fix patterns. Baseline detects violations but lacks project-specific structure.

actionable_feedback.detail: General fix suggestions, no code example

baseline.observations: All violations detected. 9 total issues reported (severity-based). No corrected code example.

actionable_feedback.detail: Specific fix per item with exact code patterns

report_completeness.detail: Exact | # | 검사 항목 | 상태 | 이슈 수 | format + full corrected code

enhanced.observations: Perfect 5-item execution. Complete corrected code example with all fixes applied.

verify-backend.uplift_analysis: Skill adds 5-item structure, AOS-specific patterns (httpx.AsyncClient, logging.getLogger), and complete corrected code. Largest uplift among verify skills.

aaa_pattern.detail: Good structure, some tests combine multiple assertions

edge_cases.detail: Error states, null values, but fewer boundary tests

mock_quality.detail: vi.fn() used, 25 vi.* calls, cleanup present

vitest_conventions.detail: vi.* (no jest.*), but relative imports in some places

baseline.observations: Comprehensive 100-test suite covering all store actions. Project rules guided vi.* usage. Wrote full new file rather than extending existing.

test_count.detail: 52 NEW tests added to existing 101 = 153 total

aaa_pattern.detail: Consistent AAA, one assertion per test

edge_cases.detail: out-of-bounds, empty, null, duplicate, trailing chars

enhanced.observations: Added 52 tests targeting UNTESTED areas of existing store. Skill-guided approach: analyze existing coverage → fill gaps. Path aliases used.

test-automation.uplift_analysis: Small uplift. Both produce high-quality tests due to project rules. Skill adds: (1) gap-filling strategy over full rewrite, (2) stricter AAA one-assertion pattern, (3) path alias enforcement. Baseline produced MORE tests (100 vs 52 new) but enhanced was more targeted.

diagnosis_accuracy.detail: 3/3 failure patterns correctly identified (XML tool output, timeout, scope violation)

root_cause_identification.detail: Root causes traced: subagent_type binding, missing time management, false negative scope check

fix_specificity.detail: All 3 fixes with exact file path + old/new content diffs. Read actual agent .md files for context.

agent-improvement.observations: Perfect score. Agent read real codebase files to produce contextually accurate fixes. Proposed SCOPE_EXTENSION tag mechanism as novel improvement. 3 summary table + per-failure deep analysis.

kpi_calculation.detail: success_rate 80%, avg_duration 444s, failure_count 1, total_agents 5 — all correct

metric_derivation.detail: background_ratio 40%, per-agent detail table, timeline analysis

agent-observability.observations: Perfect score. Identified failure correlation with preceding WebSocket fix. 5 actionable recommendations including schema enhancement, DAG dependency chain, and threshold monitoring.

key_findings: Verify skills show highest uplift (+20-25%): structured checklist format is the primary value
Development skills (rwd, ta) show low uplift (0-6%): project rules (aos-frontend.md) already cover most patterns
Skills add most value for FORMAT COMPLIANCE, not raw capability
agent-observability workflow scored 100%: mock-based eval validated skill's KPI calculation accuracy
recommendations: verify-frontend/backend: Keep as-is — clear uplift in structured verification
react-web-development: Differentiate from aos-frontend.md by adding unique patterns (advanced hooks, state patterns, performance optimization)
test-automation: Add gap-filling strategy guidance as unique value vs project rules
Workflow skills (3 remaining): Need real-world execution scenarios for proper evaluation
summary.caveat: Baseline scores influenced by project rules (CLAUDE.md → aos-*.md). True no-skill baseline would require stripping project rules.
